title: Suggestions
description: A proactive card surfaced to the user — use up an expiring ingredient, swap an out-of-stock item, or a nutrition nudge. Written by the chef planner, sourcing optimizer, and nutritionist; dismissed from the UI.

title.description: the short headline shown on the card

body.description: one or two sentences of detail / the recommended action

ingredientId.description: the ingredient this suggestion is about, if any

recipeId.description: the recipe this suggestion points at, if any

priority.description: higher = more urgent/important; the feed sorts by this

dismissed.description: whether the user dismissed the card

ingredient.description: the ingredient the suggestion is about

recipe.description: the recipe the suggestion points at
